pass1_value.note: Salesforce primarily uses OAuth 2.0 flows (Web Server, User-Agent, Username-Password, JWT Bearer, Refresh Token, Device Flow). Access tokens (Bearer) and session IDs (token) are supported. Salesforce does not use a simple API key mechanic.

final_value.note: Salesforce REST API authentication uses OAuth 2.0 and documents multiple OAuth 2.0 authorization flows including Web Server (authorization code), User-Agent (implicit), JWT bearer, SAML bearer, Username-Password, and Device flows. OAuth access tokens are used as Bearer tokens.

pass1_value.note: Developers can sign up for a free Developer Edition org which includes API access and lets them create Connected Apps to obtain client_id and client_secret for OAuth.

final_value.note: Salesforce offers a self-serve sign-up for a free Developer Edition org (described as a free, fully functional Salesforce org with no expiration date), which can be used for development and to create connected apps for API access.

pass1_value.note: Salesforce exposes a broad REST API (sObjects, query, composite, tooling, metadata) and also provides a GraphQL API for querying data; authentication via OAuth tokens applies to both.

final_value.note: Salesforce provides a broad REST API for accessing Salesforce resources (including creating/updating/deleting records, working with sObjects, and running SOQL queries) and a separate Salesforce GraphQL API that provides a GraphQL interface to query and mutate Salesforce data and services.

pass1_value.note: With a free Developer Edition and ability to create Connected Apps (client_id/secret) plus documented OAuth flows and APIs, integrations can be built today without manual sales approval. Some production orgs/editions may restrict API access and require upgrading/contacting sales, but development is feasible via Developer Edition.

final_value.note: Integrations can be built today using a free Salesforce Developer Edition org (self-serve signup) and by creating a connected app, which generates a consumer key and consumer secret used for OAuth-based authentication to Salesforce APIs.
